movie.actors: Elias Koteas, Paige Turco, Stuart Wilson, Sab Shimono
movie.genre: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Sci-Fi
movie.plot: When a magic scepter accidentally transports April back through time to 17th Century Japan, the boys take-off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way out of the sewers right into Samurai-O-Rama! Now they must battle the evil Lord Norinaga to reclaim the magic scepter that will bring them back below the subways of New York City.
movie.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
movie.writer: Kevin Eastman (based on characters created by), Peter Laird (based on characters created by), Stuart Gillard
